emails.subject: Hi!
emails.body: Hi! Hey Dena, Thanks for accompanying me to lunch today. I really enjoyed our conversation. You are very charming. The rest of this week is pretty crazy and I am going to Austin for my friends wedding this weekend, but would you be interested in getting some dinner sometime next week? Maybe Wed. or Thursday evening? Gerald

emails.subject: Re: Hi!
emails.body: Re: Hi! Sorry in getting back with you soooooo late, but it's been crazy around here!!!!! Thank YOU again for lunch!!!! I enjoyed it!!! Maybe we can go to lunch again soon. Let me know Regards, Dena Pawlowski ENRON North America P.O. Box 1188 1400 Smith Street, EB-3524c Houston, Texas 77002-7361 Office: 713-853-5073 Pager: 281-631-1310

emails.subject: Re: Hi!
emails.body: Hi Dena, Hope you had a good weekend. I went to Austin for my friends wedding. Got to see a lot of old friends that I haven't seen in a while, so that was cool. Sounds like your pretty busy these days. I can understand that with the transition moving forward. Lunch would be great. I am open later this week or early next week. Let me know what you schedule looks like. Gerald Dena Pawlowski@ENRON 03/02/2001 11:09 AM
